chapter_title: Sale or Transfer of Motor Vehicles & Master Keys
text:
In this subchapter:

(1) “Employer” means a person who:

(A) owns a facility that sells or offers for sale motor vehicles; or

(B) has the authority to determine the hours of operation of the facility.

(2) “Motor vehicle” means a self-propelled vehicle of two or more wheels designed to transport a person or property.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 728. Sale or Transfer of Motor Vehicles & Master Keys
##### § 728.001 — Definitions

In this subchapter:

    (1) “Employer” means a person who:

        (A) owns a facility that sells or offers for sale motor vehicles; or

        (B) has the authority to determine the hours of operation of the facility.

    (2) “Motor vehicle” means a self-propelled vehicle of two or more wheels designed to transport a person or property.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: A
subsections.text: owns a facility that sells or offers for sale motor vehicles; or

subsections.label: B
subsections.text: has the authority to determine the hours of operation of the facility.
“Motor vehicle” means a self-propelled vehicle of two or more wheels designed to transport a person or property.
